A

addHospital(Hospital) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Adds a reference site to the map and updates the entire map structure.
addHospitals(List<Hospital>) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Adds a list of sites in bulk and updates the map only once to optimize the performance of the triangulation engine.
addIncident(VictimIncident) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Adds an incident point to the map, snaps it to the nearest road network intersection if available, and updates the map view.
addIncidents(List<VictimIncident>) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Adds a list of incidents in bulk
addIntersection(Point) - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
Adds a new intersection to the network if it does not already exist.
addRoad(int, int, double) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
 
addRoad(int, int, double) - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
Creates a road with a specific traffic factor between two intersections identified by their indices.
addRoad(Point, Point) - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
Connects two points with a road using a default traffic factor of 1.0.
addRoad(Point, Point, double) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
 
addRoad(Point, Point, double) - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
Connects two points with a road, ensuring both points are tracked as intersections in the network.
addSpecialty(MedicalSpecialty) - Method in class geomed.app.model.Hospital
Adds a medical specialty to the hospital's capabilities.
ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class geomed.app.security.UserRole
Represents an administrator.
admitPatient() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Hospital
Attempts to admit a new patient to the hospital.
AnalyticsEngine - Class in geomed.app.algo
Audit engine providing advanced operational metrics for the inspection panel.
AnalyticsEngine() - Constructor for class geomed.app.algo.AnalyticsEngine
 
askNaturalNumber(Scanner, String) - Static method in class geomed.app.ConsoleRunner
Helper method to robustly ask for a natural number.

C

calculateCircumcenter(Point, Point, Point) - Static method in class geomed.app.algo.GeometryUtils
Calculates the circumcenter of a triangle defined by three points.
canTreat(MedicalSpecialty) - Method in class geomed.app.model.Hospital
Checks if the hospital is equipped to treat a specific type of medical emergency.
CARDIOLOGY - Enum constant in enum class geomed.app.model.MedicalSpecialty
Cardiology department for heart-related emergencies.
clear() - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Clears all hospitals, incidents, triangles, and road network data from the manager.
clear() - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
Clears all intersections and roads from the network, resetting it to an empty state.
clearMap() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Wipes all nodes and geometric shapes from the parent display container pane.
clearSelection() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Resets active selection states and clear highlight collections tracking entities.
clearSelectionDetails() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.SidebarController
Resets the structural details description components to their default states.
computeHospitalStats(Hospital, List<VictimIncident>) - Static method in class geomed.app.algo.AnalyticsEngine
Computes comprehensive operational statistics for a given hospital based on assigned incidents.
computeIncidentDensity(double, int) - Static method in class geomed.app.algo.AnalyticsEngine
Calculates the incident density for a given area (scaled to a readable 10k px² format).
computeOptimalPath(Point, Point) - Method in class geomed.app.algo.RoutingEngine
Computes the optimal (shortest) path between two points using an optimized Dijkstra's algorithm.
computeRoadForIncident(VictimIncident) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Computes the optimal road path from a specific incident location to its closest hospital site.
ConsoleRunner - Class in geomed.app
The ConsoleRunner class serves as the command-line interface entry point for the application.
ConsoleRunner() - Constructor for class geomed.app.ConsoleRunner
 
containsInCircumcircle(Point) - Method in class geomed.app.model.Triangle
Determines if a given point lies within the circumcircle of this triangle.
createAuditMessage(VictimIncident, Hospital) - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.GDPRReportingService
Creates a secure audit trail log message for tracking purposes.
CsvIncidentImporter - Class in geomed.app.io
Utility class responsible for importing victim incident data from a CSV file.
CsvIncidentImporter() - Constructor for class geomed.app.io.CsvIncidentImporter
 
CsvSiteImporter - Class in geomed.app.io
Utility class responsible for importing hospital site data from a CSV file.
CsvSiteImporter() - Constructor for class geomed.app.io.CsvSiteImporter
 

D

DecisionScore - Class in geomed.app.explainability
Stores the breakdown of the automated decision metrics for a specific hospital.
DecisionScore(double, double, double, boolean, double, double) - Constructor for class geomed.app.explainability.DecisionScore
Constructs a new DecisionScore container with the specified evaluation metrics.
DelaunayEngine - Class in geomed.app.algo
Engine responsible for generating a 2D Delaunay Triangulation from a set of points
DelaunayEngine() - Constructor for class geomed.app.algo.DelaunayEngine
 
deleteSelectedElement() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Deletes the active selected element (either a Hospital node or VictimIncident instance) from both the model data layer and map display layout before forcing a viewport refresh.
dischargePatient() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Hospital
Discharges a patient from the hospital, freeing up one bed.
DispatchDecision - Class in geomed.app.explainability
Encapsulates the complete result of a dispatch assignment decision.
DispatchDecision(Hospital, Map<Hospital, DecisionScore>) - Constructor for class geomed.app.explainability.DispatchDecision
Constructs a new DispatchDecision payload.
DispatchEngine - Class in geomed.app.algo
Core decision engine for medical emergency dispatching.
DispatchEngine() - Constructor for class geomed.app.algo.DispatchEngine
 
displayAdvancedHospitalStats(Set<Hospital>) - Static method in class geomed.app.ConsoleRunner
Displays advanced operational and distance statistics for all active hospitals
displayRoutes(List<VictimIncident>) - Static method in class geomed.app.ConsoleRunner
Displays the calculated optimal routes for each active incident
displayTriangles(List<Triangle>) - Static method in class geomed.app.ConsoleRunner
Displays the triangles with advanced geometric and operational metrics.
displayVoronoiCells(List<VoronoiCell>) - Static method in class geomed.app.ConsoleRunner
Displays the calculated Voronoi cells and their sorted vertices in the console.
distanceSquaredTo(double, double) - Method in class geomed.app.model.Point
Calculate the squared brut Euclidean distance with another point.
DOCTOR - Enum constant in enum class geomed.app.security.UserRole
Represents a medical doctor.

E

Edge - Class in geomed.app.model
Represents an undirected edge between two Point objects.
Edge(Point, Point) - Constructor for class geomed.app.model.Edge
Constructs a new Edge between the two specified endpoints.
equals(Object) - Method in record class geomed.app.algo.RoutingResult
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in class geomed.app.model.Edge
Compares this edge to the specified object for equality.
equals(Object) - Method in class geomed.app.model.Point
Compares this point to the specified object.
evaluateBestDispatch(VictimIncident, Set<Hospital>, RoutingEngine, List<Triangle>) - Method in class geomed.app.algo.DispatchEngine
Evaluates all available hospitals to find the optimal dispatch destination for an incident.
export(MapManager, OutputStream) - Static method in class geomed.app.io.MapBinarySerializer
Serializes the model content (intersections, roads, hospitals, incidents) into a binary output stream.
exportToFile(MapManager, Path) - Static method in class geomed.app.io.MapBinarySerializer
Exports the current state of the map manager to a file on the disk.

FILE_EXTENSION - Static variable in class geomed.app.io.MapBinarySerializer
Standard file extension for the application's maps.

findNearestIntersection(Point) - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork

G

GDPRReportingService - Class in geomed.app.explainability
Service dedicated exclusively to transparency, auditability, and the generation of GDPR compliance reports.

GENERAL - Enum constant in enum class geomed.app.model.MedicalSpecialty
General medicine for standard or non-specialized emergencies.
generateGDPRSummary(VictimIncident, DispatchDecision) - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.GDPRReportingService
Generates a detailed GDPR compliance report from the decision made by the dispatch engine.
generateRandomHospitals(int, int) - Static method in class geomed.app.test.SimulationDataGenerator
Generates an array list of randomized hospital structures.
generateRandomIncidents(int, int, List<Hospital>) - Static method in class geomed.app.test.SimulationDataGenerator
Generates a batch collection of randomized emergency victim incidents.
generateRandomRoads(MapManager, int) - Static method in class geomed.app.test.SimulationDataGenerator
Injects a randomized, multi-weighted grid network of roads interconnecting registered active hospital nodes.
generateVoronoiCells(Set<Hospital>, List<Triangle>) - Method in class geomed.app.algo.VoronoiEngine
Generates all closed Voronoi cells on the map based on the provided hospitals and Delaunay triangulation.

getArea() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Triangle
Calculates the surface area of the triangle using the Cartesian determinant formula.
getArea() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VoronoiCell
Calculates the area of the Voronoi cell.

Gets the total number of active incidents assigned to the hospital.
getAverageDistance() - Method in class geomed.app.model.HospitalStats
Gets the average travel distance for all assigned emergencies.

getBaseDistance() - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadEdge

getClosestHospital() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VictimIncident

getCurrentPatients() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Hospital
Gets the current number of patients in the hospital.

Retrieves the authorization role assigned to the current session.

Gets the geometric proximity score.

getEmergencyType() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VictimIncident

getEnd() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Edge
Gets the ending point of this edge.

getHistoryBonus() - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.DecisionScore
Gets the ethical prioritization bonus linked to the patient's medical background.
getHospital() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VoronoiCell
Returns the hospital associated with this Voronoi cell.
getId() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Site
Retrieves the unique identifier of the site.
getIncidentCountForHospital(Hospital, List<VictimIncident>) - Static method in class geomed.app.algo.AnalyticsEngine
Counts the total number of incidents assigned to a specific hospital.
getIncidentId() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VictimIncident
Gets the unique tracking identifier of the incident.
getIncidents() - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Returns an unmodifiable view of the victim incidents list to preserve strict encapsulation.
getIntersections() - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
Retrieves an unmodifiable view of all intersections in the road network.
getMaxDistance() - Method in class geomed.app.model.HospitalStats
Gets the distance to the furthest emergency case.
getMedicalNotes() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VictimIncident
Retrieves the simulated clinical notes and patient anamnesis for this emergency.
getMinDistance() - Method in class geomed.app.model.HospitalStats
Gets the distance to the closest emergency case.
getOccupancyRate() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Hospital
Calculates the current occupancy rate of the hospital.
getOptimalHospital() - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.DispatchDecision
Gets the hospital selected as the optimal destination.
getPreferredHospitalId() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VictimIncident
Gets the unique identifier of the hospital where the patient has a historical clinical record.
getRoadNetwork() - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
 
getRoads() - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
Retrieves an unmodifiable view of all roads in the road network.
getRoutingEngine() - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Returns the routing engine instance, initializing it on demand if it does not yet exist.
getRoutingScore() - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.DecisionScore
Gets the real-time routing score computed from road and traffic constraints.
getSaturationPenalty() - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.DecisionScore
Gets the penalty applied based on the hospital's current occupancy rate.
getScoringMatrix() - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.DispatchDecision
Gets the full scoring matrix containing explanation details for all evaluated hospitals.
getSites() - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Returns an unmodifiable view of the hospitals list to preserve strict encapsulation.
getSpecialties() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Hospital
Retrieves an unmodifiable view of the hospital's medical specialties.
getStart() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Edge
Gets the starting point of this edge.
getStart() - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadEdge
 
getStatsForHospital(Hospital) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Delegates statistical calculation to the stateless AnalyticsEngine.
getTotalScore() - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.DecisionScore
Gets the final aggregated score used to select the optimal destination.
getTrafficFactor() - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadEdge
 
getTriangleLoadImbalance(Triangle) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Delegates imbalance analysis to the stateless AnalyticsEngine.
getTriangleLoadImbalance(Triangle, List<VictimIncident>) - Static method in class geomed.app.algo.AnalyticsEngine
Evaluates the workload distribution disparity among the three hospitals forming a Delaunay triangle.
getTriangles() - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Returns an unmodifiable view of the triangles list to preserve strict encapsulation.
getVertices() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VoronoiCell
Returns the list of vertices that form the boundaries of this cell.
getVoronoiCells() - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Delegates the generation of Voronoi cells to the dedicated geometry engine.
getVoronoiNeighbors(Hospital) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Identifies and returns all neighboring hospitals based on the Delaunay triangulation structure.

The "Cost" or "Weight" of the road.

I

importFromCsv(Path, int) - Static method in class geomed.app.io.CsvIncidentImporter
Parses a CSV file containing incident (victim) data and converts it into a list of VictimIncident.

Parses a CSV file containing hospital reference site data and converts it into a list of Hospital.

Imports map data from a binary file and loads it into the manager.

importMap(MapManager, InputStream) - Static method in class geomed.app.io.MapBinarySerializer
Deserializes and reconstructs the map state from a binary input stream.
initialize() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MainController
Post-initialization constructor lifecycle hook executed automatically by JavaFX loading routines.
initialize() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Post-initialization constructor hook automatically executed by structural FXML loader components.
initialize() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.SidebarController
Automatically invoked by JavaFX loaders once FXML component mapping routines complete.
isPointInCircumcircle(Point, Triangle) - Static method in class geomed.app.algo.GeometryUtils
Checks if a point lies inside the circumcircle of a given triangle.
isSaturated() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Hospital
Checks whether the hospital has reached or exceeded its saturation threshold.
isSpecialtyMatched() - Method in class geomed.app.explainability.DecisionScore
Checks if the hospital possesses the required medical specialty for the incident.

M

Serializes and deserializes a complete map to a binary file.
MapController - Class in geomed.app.controller
Controller class responsible for rendering the map visualization layer and managing its UI interactions.
MapController() - Constructor for class geomed.app.controller.MapController
 
MapImporterOSM - Class in geomed.app.io
Utility class responsible for importing and parsing OpenStreetMap (OSM) data exported in JSON format (Overpass API style) into the application's road network model.
MapImporterOSM() - Constructor for class geomed.app.io.MapImporterOSM
 
MapManager - Class in geomed.app.model
Manages and orchestrates map data.

MedicalSpecialty - Enum Class in geomed.app.model
Represents the various medical specialties available within the dispatch system.

NEUROLOGY - Enum constant in enum class geomed.app.model.MedicalSpecialty

R

randomTest(Scanner, int) - Static method in class geomed.app.ConsoleRunner
Performs an automated test by generating random hospitals and victim incidents.
refreshMap() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Wipes all child objects drawn inside the primary panel layout area and sequentially triggers layered redraw passes for active data components.
removeHospital(Hospital) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Removes a reference site from the map and updates the entire map structure.
removeIncident(VictimIncident) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Removes a user point from the map.
RoadEdge - Class in geomed.app.model
Represents a physical road segment connecting two intersections.
RoadEdge(Point, Point) - Constructor for class geomed.app.model.RoadEdge
 
RoadEdge(Point, Point, double) - Constructor for class geomed.app.model.RoadEdge
Constructs a new road between two intersections.
RoadNetwork - Class in geomed.app.model
Encapsulates the road network graph structure representing intersections (vertices) and roads (edges).
RoadNetwork() - Constructor for class geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
 
RoutingEngine - Class in geomed.app.algo
Optimized routing engine that calculates shortest paths on a road network.
RoutingEngine(List<RoadEdge>) - Constructor for class geomed.app.algo.RoutingEngine
Constructs a RoutingEngine and pre-computes the adjacency list.
RoutingResult - Record Class in geomed.app.algo
Encapsulates the result of a routing operation, combining the geometric path and its pre-calculated total operational cost.
RoutingResult(List<Point>, double) - Constructor for record class geomed.app.algo.RoutingResult
Creates an instance of a RoutingResult record class.

S

SecurityContext - Class in geomed.app.security
Global security context management class for handling user session roles and access control.
setClosestHospital(Site) - Method in class geomed.app.model.VictimIncident
Associates this incident point to its optimized or closest geographical hospital site

Updates the authorization role for the current session.

setSidebarController(SidebarController) - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Hooks complementary UI action layout components tracking sidebar configurations.

Modifies the traffic state on this road.
setX(double) - Method in class geomed.app.model.Point
 
setY(double) - Method in class geomed.app.model.Point
 
showHospitalDetails(Hospital) - Method in class geomed.app.controller.SidebarController
Evaluates and formats data regarding a selected hospital, including geospatial analysis metrics such as its bounding Voronoi cell area and historical incident clustering density
showIncidentDetails(VictimIncident) - Method in class geomed.app.controller.SidebarController
Builds and appends metadata outputs for a highlighted incident.
showTriangleDetails(Triangle) - Method in class geomed.app.controller.SidebarController
Extracts and displays information about a clicked Delaunay Triangle.

Controller class for the JavaFX sidebar user interface.

Site - Class in geomed.app.model
Represents a physical site on the map, extending the base Point class.

Creates a new site with an identifier and coordinates.
sortByPolarAngle(Point, List<Point>) - Static method in class geomed.app.algo.GeometryUtils
Sorts a list of points counter-clockwise (polaire) around a center point
start(Stage) - Method in class geomed.app.MainApp
Starts the primary stage of the JavaFX application.

T

toggleAssignmentsVisibility() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Inverts the display visibility preference flag of target matching vectors linking incidents to their resolved destinations and updates the viewport.
toggleTrianglesVisibility() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Toggles whether Delaunay Triangulation grid lines are drawn on the panel, then refreshes the canvas view.
toggleVoronoiVisibility() - Method in class geomed.app.controller.MapController
Toggles whether Voronoi boundary cell shapes are drawn on the panel, then refreshes the canvas view.

Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Edge
Returns a string representation of this edge.
toString() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Point
 
toString() - Method in class geomed.app.model.RoadEdge
 
toString() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Site
Returns a string representation of the site, including its ID and spatial coordinates.
toString() - Method in class geomed.app.model.Triangle
 
toString() - Method in class geomed.app.model.VictimIncident
Returns a string representation of the incident, including its coordinates and assigned hospital.
totalCost() - Method in record class geomed.app.algo.RoutingResult
Returns the value of the totalCost record component.
TRAUMATOLOGY - Enum constant in enum class geomed.app.model.MedicalSpecialty
Traumatology department for severe physical injuries and accidents.
Triangle - Class in geomed.app.model
Represents a geometric triangle defined by three vertices in a 2D plane.
Triangle(Point, Point, Point) - Constructor for class geomed.app.model.Triangle
Constructs a new Triangle with the specified vertices.
triangulate(Set<Hospital>) - Method in class geomed.app.algo.DelaunayEngine
Computes the Delaunay Triangulation for a given list of hospitals (points)

U

updateAll() - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Updates the entire map state by recalculating the Delaunay triangulation and updating all user assignments.
updateSingleUserAssignment(VictimIncident) - Method in class geomed.app.model.MapManager
Evaluates and applies the optimal dispatch decision for a single victim incident.
UserRole - Enum Class in geomed.app.security
Defines the user roles within the application for Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class geomed.app.model.MedicalSpecialty
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class geomed.app.security.UserRole
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class geomed.app.model.MedicalSpecialty
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class geomed.app.security.UserRole
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
VERSION - Static variable in class geomed.app.io.MapBinarySerializer
Current version of the binary file format.
VictimIncident - Class in geomed.app.model
Represents a medical emergency incident on the map topology.
VictimIncident(double, double, String, MedicalSpecialty, Integer) - Constructor for class geomed.app.model.VictimIncident
Constructs a VictimIncident with complete medical and structural metadata, including known historical patient data.
VoronoiCell - Class in geomed.app.model
Pure domain model representing a Voronoi cell.
VoronoiCell(Hospital, List<Point>) - Constructor for class geomed.app.model.VoronoiCell
Constructs a new VoronoiCell with the specified hospital and vertices.
VoronoiEngine - Class in geomed.app.algo
Engine responsible for computing Voronoi cells from a Delaunay mesh.
VoronoiEngine() - Constructor for class geomed.app.algo.VoronoiEngine
